title: Memphis Design & Code: Introducing Tiger Web Lab

location.name: Crews Center for Entrepreneurship, 2nd Floor - University of Memphis

summary: Come and listen to Nadia Zirak introduce an upcoming organization, Tiger Web Lab, that plans on helping out the nonprofit community while giving its members opportunities to build something real.

description.whoIsThisFor: UI/UX designers, software engineers, or aspiring developers who want to level up their web game and understand performance-focused development.

agenda.details: Grab some food and meet new faces.

Naim will break down his exact process for creating various game assets—from UI elements and buttons to animations and full environments. Whether you're interested in the coding side of game development or the visual storytelling of animation, you'll walk away with a better understanding of how design thinking and creativity fuel technical innovation.
A space to share projects, ask follow-up questions, and connect with the community.

speakers.name: Naim Hakeem
speakers.talkTitle: Design Process of Game Assets and Animations

rsvp.details: Please confirm your attendance via this Meetup page so we can get an accurate headcount for food.

stayConnected: Learn more about Design and Code at our website - www.memphisdesignandcode.com
